code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    let s = string.trim(line)
    let n = string.len(s)
    mut sum = 0
    mut i = 0
    while i < n
      match string.byte_at(s, i)
      when Some(b)
        if b >= 48 and b <= 57
          sum = sum + (b - 48)
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    println("digit_sum=#{sum}")
  when None
    println("digit_sum=0")
  end
end
